text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy has announced that the Strait of Hormuz will be closed from this evening until the U.S. naval blockade on Iranian ports and vessels is lifted. The IRGC said that yesterday, a number of non‑military vessels were permitted to transit through the “Lark corridor” with Iranian coordination, but the U.S. failed to honour its ceasefire commitments. “Any vessel approaching the strait will be considered cooperating with the enemy and will be targeted,” the statement warned. The IRGC added that Trump’s statements regarding the strait have no credibility, and that mariners should follow only official Iranian channels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布，霍尔木兹海峡将从今晚起关闭，直至美国解除对伊朗港口和船只的海上封锁。伊斯兰革命卫队表示，昨天在伊朗的协调下，一些非军事船只被允许通过“拉尔克走廊”，但美国未能履行其停火承诺。声明警告称：“任何接近海峡的船只都将被视为与敌人合作，并将成为攻击目标。”伊斯兰革命卫队还补充说，特朗普关于海峡的言论毫无可信度，海员应仅遵循伊朗官方渠道。 @wfwitness

text: IDF announces the death of a soldier who died of wounds sustained in southern Lebanon: Master Sergeant (Res.) Barak Kalfon, 48.
text_zh: 以色列国防军宣布一名士兵因在黎巴嫩南部受重伤而不治身亡：预备役军士长巴拉克·卡尔丰（Barak Kalfon），48岁。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 A Israeli reservist soldier, Barak Kalphon, 48, from Adi, has died from wounds sustained in southern Lebanon yesterday. He was a fighter in the 7056 battalion of the 226th reserve paratrooper brigade. The incident occurred around 11:30am while troops were scanning a building in a western sector village. An explosive device detonated; the military estimates it was placed before the ceasefire. It is unclear whether the bomb was triggered remotely or by the soldiers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 来自阿迪（Adi）的48岁以色列预备役士兵巴拉克·卡尔丰（Barak Kalphon）因昨天在黎巴嫩南部受重伤而不治身亡。他是第226预备役伞兵旅第7056营的战士。事件发生在上午11:30左右，当时部队正在西部地区的一个村庄搜查建筑物。一枚爆炸装置被引爆；军方估计该装置是在停火前放置的。目前尚不清楚炸弹是远程触发的还是由士兵触发的。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem is expected to deliver a speech at 9pm Beirut time. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Hezbollah Secretary‑General Naim Qassem said the temporary ceasefire would not have been achieved without the resistance’s legendary performance, and that Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to U.S. violations, forcing Israel to stop its attacks. Qassem criticised a U.S. State Department ceasefire statement issued after the truce took effect, calling it an insult to Lebanon and noting that the Lebanese government had not met or approved it. He demanded a complete halt to hostilities, Israeli withdrawal to the border, prisoner release, the return of displaced residents, and reconstruction. He added that Hezbollah does not trust the enemy and will keep its hand on the trigger, responding to any violations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆预计将于贝鲁特时间晚上9点发表讲话。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆表示，如果没有抵抗力量的传奇表现，临时停火就不会实现；伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡是为了回应美国的违规行为，迫使以色列停止袭击。卡西姆批评了停火生效后美国国务院发表的停火声明，称其是对黎巴嫩的侮辱，并指出黎巴嫩政府并未开会或批准该声明。他要求彻底停止敌对行动、以色列撤军至边境、释放囚犯、流离失所者返回以及进行重建。他补充说，真主党不信任敌人，将保持警惕，随时准备应对任何违规行为。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 Tasnim News Agency: Yemen’s Houthi Defence Minister Mohammed Nasser al-Atifi announced that the armed forces are at the highest level of readiness to confront any threat. He said the recent round of fighting demonstrated the unity of fronts and proved the effectiveness of the resistance axis’ military operations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇾🇪 塔斯尼姆通讯社：也门胡塞武装国防部长穆罕默德·纳赛尔·阿提菲宣布，武装部队已处于应对任何威胁的最高戒备状态。他表示，最近一轮战斗展示了各战线的团结，并证明了抵抗轴心军事行动的有效性。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 U.S. sources to MTV: Contacts between Washington and Baabda continues, with another call expected between Trump and Aoun, as Washington signals red lines including rejecting revival of the 1949 armistice @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 美国消息人士向MTV透露：华盛顿与巴卜达（Baabda）之间的联系仍在继续，预计特朗普与奥恩之间将再次通话，华盛顿发出了包括拒绝恢复1949年停战协定在内的红线信号 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Ibrahim Azizi, head of Iran's parliamentary National Security Commission, posted on X calling Trump's claims "lies and fantasies," including "uranium handover to America," "full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz," "continued naval blockade of Iran," and "zero enrichment." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗议会国家安全委员会主席易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ibrahim Azizi）在X上发文，称特朗普的说法是“谎言和幻想”，包括“向美国移交铀”、“全面重新开放霍尔木兹海峡”、“继续对伊朗进行海上封锁”以及“零浓缩”。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 BREAKING | “The war may resume in the coming days.” – According to Israel's Channel 12, the White House held an important security meeting today regarding the ongoing crisis around the Strait of Hormuz, three days before the ceasefire deadline. ➡️ President Donald Trump has been personally involved in negotiations with Iran in recent days. ➡️ Israeli officials state that they are not taking risks and are currently preparing for the resumption of combat operations in the coming days. "If there is no breakthrough today, the war may resume in the coming days," said a senior American official. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 快讯 | “战争可能会在未来几天内恢复。”——据以色列第12频道报道，白宫今天就霍尔木兹海峡周围持续的危机举行了重要的安全会议，距离停火截止日期还有三天。➡️ 唐纳德·特朗普总统最近几天亲自参与了与伊朗的谈判。➡️ 以色列官员表示，他们不会冒险，目前正在为未来几天恢复作战行动做准备。“如果今天没有突破，战争可能会在未来几天内恢复，”一位美国高级官员说。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: WarMonitor I guess I'll be starting the garden today. Trump Ended Free Trade for Mexican Tomatoes. Prices Are Up 23 Percent in the Last Year. America gets 90 percent of its fresh tomatoes from Mexico, and those imports were tariff-free until last year https://reason.com/2026/04/17/trump-ended-free-trade-for-mexican-tomatoes-prices-are-up-23-percent-in-the-last-year/ - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 我想我今天得开始打理花园了。特朗普结束了墨西哥番茄的自由贸易。去年价格上涨了23%。美国90%的鲜番茄来自墨西哥，而这些进口产品在去年之前是免关税的 https://reason.com/2026/04/17/trump-ended-free-trade-for-mexican-tomatoes-prices-are-up-23-percent-in-the-last-year/ - 反对特朗普的共和党人 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 I24News: An investigation is underway in Israel regarding a suspected espionage case involving two regular air force soldiers who have been detained for about a month. The soldiers were allegedly tasked by their Iranian operators to gather information not only on military bases and weapon systems but also on senior officials, including Israeli Finance Minister Smotrich. Other soldiers, some from sensitive units, were initially arrested but their cases have been transferred to the military police for further handling. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 I24News：以色列正在对一起涉嫌间谍案进行调查，两名现役空军士兵已被拘留约一个月。据称，这些士兵受伊朗操作员指使，不仅收集有关军事基地和武器系统的情报，还收集包括以色列财政部长斯莫特里赫在内的高级官员的情报。其他一些来自敏感部队的士兵最初也被逮捕，但他们的案件已移交宪兵队作进一步处理。 @wfwitness

text: 🇧🇾 ⚡️ Belarus President Alexander Lukashenko in interview with RT: "Trump has shown the whole world that the United States of America is not all-powerful. It is a superpower, but not a super force." "If the Americans couldn't handle Iran, then they should not mess with China. They will never be able to deal with that kind of power." 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇧🇾 ⚡️ 白俄罗斯总统亚历山大·卢卡申科在接受RT采访时表示：“特朗普向全世界表明，美利坚合众国并非无所不能。它是一个超级大国，但不是超级力量。”“如果美国人连伊朗都对付不了，那他们就不应该去招惹中国。他们永远无法应对那种力量。” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: For the second time these 48 hours Israeli forces go deeper into south Lebanon and hit IEDs that were prepared beforehand Watch the IDF retaliate criminally even though this was not a ceasefire violations And btw, demolitions are in full swing all over south Lebanon
text_zh: 在48小时内，以色列军队第二次深入黎巴嫩南部，并触碰了预先埋设的简易爆炸装置。请看以色列国防军如何进行犯罪性的报复，尽管这并非违反停火协议。顺便提一下，黎巴嫩南部的拆除行动正在全面展开

text: A senior U.S. official told Axios that without a breakthrough soon, the war could resume within days.
text_zh: 一位美国高级官员告诉Axios，如果近期没有突破，战争可能会在几天内恢复。

text: Trump gathered top national security officials in the Situation Room Saturday as tensions with Iran escalated following new threats to close the Strait of Hormuz. Behind the scenes, senior officials say recent diplomacy has made some progress on key nuclear issues like uranium enrichment, but major gaps remain. Source: Axios
text_zh: 随着伊朗威胁关闭霍尔木兹海峡导致紧张局势升级，特朗普周六在战情室召集了高级国家安全官员。幕后情况是，高级官员表示，近期的外交努力在铀浓缩等关键核问题上取得了一些进展，但仍存在重大分歧。来源：Axios

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷🇮🇳⚡️ Two Indian-flagged vessels — the VLCC Supertanker SANMAR HERALD (IMO 9330563), loaded with approximately 2 million barrels of Iraqi crude oil from Al Basrah Anchorage, and the bulk carrier JAG ARNAV (IMO 9705354) — made sudden U-turns near the southern…" 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 India expressed deep concern to Iran over firing on Indian merchant ships in Strait of Hormuz and urged for the resumption of safe passage. TankerTrackers.com has released an audio recording from the moment Iran's Sepah Navy (IRGC Navy) opened fire on Indian-flagged vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. "Sepah Navy! Motor Tanker Sanmar Herald! Sepah Navy! You gave me clearance to go! Sepah Navy! Sepah Navy! This is Motor Tanker Sanmar Herald! My name is second on your list! You gave me clearance to go! You're firing now — let me turn back!" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷🇮🇳⚡️ 两艘悬挂印度国旗的船只——载有约200万桶伊拉克原油（来自巴士拉锚地）的VLCC超级油轮SANMAR HERALD号（IMO 9330563），以及散货船JAG ARNAV号（IMO 9705354）——在南部附近突然掉头……” 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 印度就霍尔木兹海峡向印度商船开火一事向伊朗表示严重关切，并敦促恢复安全通行。TankerTrackers.com发布了一段音频记录，记录了伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC Navy）在霍尔木兹海峡向悬挂印度国旗的船只开火的瞬间。“伊斯兰革命卫队海军！Sanmar Herald号油轮！伊斯兰革命卫队海军！你们给了我通行许可！伊斯兰革命卫队海军！伊斯兰革命卫队海军！我是Sanmar Herald号油轮！我的名字在你们的名单上排第二！你们给了我通行许可！你们现在开火了——让我掉头！” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Dan Caine, has been spotted at the White House amid rising tensions with Iran. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman Caine leaving the White House about an hour and a half ago as tensions with Iran rise after negotiations have stalled. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 在与伊朗紧张局势加剧之际，美国参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军被发现出现在白宫。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 由于谈判陷入僵局，与伊朗的紧张局势加剧，美国参谋长联席会议主席凯恩于大约一个半小时前离开白宫。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇮🇷 Kan : A regional governing source told Kan News that Qatar and Iran reached an understanding in the final days of the war: Iran significantly reduced its attacks on Qatar, and in return, Al Jazeera took a less militant line against Tehran, giving more airtime to Iranian spokespeople. Qatar has strongly denied any such deal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇶🇦 🇮🇷 Kan：一位地区治理消息人士告诉Kan新闻，卡塔尔和伊朗在战争最后几天达成了谅解：伊朗大幅减少了对卡塔尔的袭击，作为回报，半岛电视台对德黑兰采取了不那么激进的立场，给予伊朗发言人更多的播出时间。卡塔尔强烈否认了任何此类交易。@wfwitness

text: ترقبوا بيان من حجة الإسلام والمسلمين الأمين العام لحزب الله سماحة الشيخ نعيم قاسم اليوم السبت 18-04-2026 عند الساعة 09:00 مساءً عبر شاشة قناة المنار وأثير إذاعة النور تتناول آخر التطورات.
text_zh: 敬请关注真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆谢赫（Hojjat al-Islam wal-Muslimin）于今日周六（2026年4月18日）晚上09:00通过灯塔电视台（Al-Manar）和努尔电台（Al-Nour）发表的声明，届时将讨论最新进展。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem is expected to deliver a speech at 9pm Beirut time. @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Middle East Spectator — MES: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 WATCH: For the first time, footage has been released of an Iranian hospital being bombed by the American-Zionist alliance during the early days of the war At 0:37, a nurse can be seen desperately trying to save as many infants as she can carry. @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: We'll have to start dropping bombs again if Iran doesn't surrender to our demands. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普总统：如果伊朗不屈服于我们的要求，我们将不得不再次开始投掷炸弹。推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Spain's PM gives a message to "the right and the extreme right" that oppose his regularization of half a million migrants, "we are the children of migration in Spain, we will not be the parents of xenophobia... we are proud to be on the right side of history." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045556270032158868/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 西班牙首相向反对他将50万移民合法化的“右翼和极右翼”传达了一个信息：“我们是西班牙移民的孩子，我们不会成为仇外心理的父母……我们为站在历史正确的一边感到自豪。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045556270032158868/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - Spain's PM says, "Being progressive is more important now than ever," speaking at the "Global Progressive Mobilisation" conference that, "offers a necessary alternative to conservative and far-right forces." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045556075676475624/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 西班牙首相在“全球进步动员”会议上表示，“进步现在比以往任何时候都更重要”，该会议“为保守派和极右翼势力提供了必要的替代方案”。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045556075676475624/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The IDF says it carried out a special operation in southern Lebanon just minutes before the ceasefire with Hezbollah took effect. The IAF's elite Shaldag unit landed at Cristofani Ridge, several kilometers north of Mount Hermon, and established control of the strategic position. IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir approved the raid and observed the operation alongside IAF chief Maj. Gen. Tomer Bar from the IAF's command center. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军表示，在与真主党的停火协议生效前几分钟，他们在黎巴嫩南部执行了一次特别行动。以色列空军的精锐Shaldag部队降落在黑门山以北几公里的克里斯托法尼山脊（Cristofani Ridge），并控制了这一战略阵地。以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔中将批准了这次突袭，并与以色列空军司令托默·巴尔少将一起在以色列空军指挥中心观察了行动。推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 India summoned Iran’s ambassador following two incidents involving Indian-flagged vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. One tanker came under fire from IRGC gunboats, while another ship was hit by an unidentified projectile. The developments come as vessels report Iran issuing VHF warnings that the strait is “completely closed” to all nationalities, according to Reuters. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 最新消息 🔴 在发生两起涉及悬挂印度国旗船只的事件后，印度召见了伊朗大使。一艘油轮遭到伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队炮艇的开火，另一艘船被不明弹丸击中。据路透社报道，随着船只报告伊朗发出甚高频（VHF）警告称海峡对所有国籍船只“完全关闭”，事态进一步发展。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Iranian officials say they will prioritize releasing ships that pay the toll in the Hormuz Strait, while vessels that do not pay the fees will have their passage "postponed." — CNN tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 刚刚消息 - 伊朗官员表示，他们将优先放行在霍尔木兹海峡支付通行费的船只，而未支付费用的船只将被“推迟”通行。— CNN 推文

text: WarTranslated A view of the burning port of Tuapse from space. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045550261251301566/photo/1 The fire at the Tuapse oil port continues. Aerial view. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045400915918598528/video/1 - WarTranslated tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @MarionMarechal : Je me félicite du sommet organisé ce vendredi à Paris, dans le sillage d’Emmanuel Macron, Keir Starmer, Giorgia Meloni et Friedrich Merz. Une cinquantaine de pays s’y sont réunis pour construire une position commune sur la sécurisation du détroit d’Ormuz, point stratégique dont la fermeture a eu des conséquences économiques mondiales. Les États-Unis ne peuvent empêcher leurs alliés de l’OTAN d’agir, une fois la paix établie, pour garantir la sécurité de cette zone. Il est donc sain de voir les partenaires européens coopérer efficacement, leurs positions ayant convergé vers un projet de mission multinationale assurant la liberté de navigation. Mais l’initiative ne fait pas tout : le fait de devoir sortir du cadre de l’Union européenne, notamment pour associer Londres, révèle les limites de cette organisation. L’UE manque encore de souplesse et de cohésion pour soutenir les politiques de puissance de ses États membres, alors qu’elle devrait en être le levier de légitimation. Il faut donc saluer ces initiatives tout en accélérant la réforme de l’UE : renforcement des capacités de défense des nations européennes, clarification du rôle des institutions (en appui et non en doublon), compétitivité industrielle accrue et réduction de nos dépendances stratégiques. Après l’Ukraine, le conflit entre les États-Unis, Israël et l’Iran montre que l’Europe ne sera pas épargnée par les tensions du siècle. Ce sommet est une étape positive, à condition qu’il ouvre la voie à une véritable politique d’indépendance continentale. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @MarionMarechal：我对本周五在巴黎组织的峰会表示欢迎，紧随埃马纽埃尔·马克龙、基尔·斯塔默、乔治亚·梅洛尼和弗里德里希·默茨的步伐。大约五十个国家聚集在那里，就确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全建立共同立场，这是一个战略要点，其关闭产生了全球经济后果。一旦和平建立，美国无法阻止其北约盟国采取行动以确保该地区的安全。因此，看到欧洲伙伴有效合作是健康的，他们的立场已经趋向于一个确保航行自由的多国任务项目。但倡议并不是全部：必须跳出欧盟框架，特别是为了联合伦敦，揭示了这个组织的局限性。欧盟仍然缺乏灵活性和凝聚力来支持其成员国的大国政策，而它本应是合法化的杠杆。因此，我们必须在欢迎这些倡议的同时加快欧盟的改革：加强欧洲国家的防御能力，明确机构的作用（支持而非重复），提高工业竞争力并减少我们的战略依赖。继乌克兰之后，美国、以色列和伊朗之间的冲突表明，欧洲将无法幸免于本世纪的紧张局势。如果这次峰会能为真正的欧洲大陆独立政策铺平道路，那么它就是一个积极的步骤。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @VLS_Appreciator : For those complaining that SAMP/T and Aster productions are too low, know that those are well known concerns being addressed as we speak. https://twitter.com/VLS_Appreciator/status/2045280180680241576/photo/1 The German systematic disregard for the SAMP/T-NG is more than frustrating. A mature, efficient European system with a shared missile across platforms seing a production ramp-up, but no not good enough. https://twitter.com/VLS_Appreciator/status/2045268201022300351/photo/1 - VLS Enjoyer tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @VLS_Appreciator：对于那些抱怨SAMP/T和Aster产量太低的人，要知道这些众所周知的担忧正在我们谈话时得到解决。https://twitter.com/VLS_Appreciator/status/2045280180680241576/photo/1 德国对SAMP/T-NG的系统性忽视令人沮丧。一个成熟、高效的欧洲系统，在各平台间共享导弹，产量正在增加，但这还不够好。https://twitter.com/VLS_Appreciator/status/2045268201022300351/photo/1 - VLS Enjoyer 推文

text: WarTranslated FirePoint’s FP-1 dodges gunfire over Russia’s Samara region about 1,000 km from the border. Similar scenes were seen at Ust-Luga and with its sibling Liutyi. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045549042306896013/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated FirePoint的FP-1在距离边境约1000公里的俄罗斯萨马拉地区躲避炮火。在乌斯季卢加（Ust-Luga）及其姊妹机Liutyi上也出现了类似的场景。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045549042306896013/video/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command A U.S. Marine aboard the forward-deployed amphibious transport dock ship USS New Orleans (LPD 18) monitors shipping during U.S. maritime blockade operations. https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045548871393194238/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 一名美国海军陆战队员在前方部署的两栖运输船坞舰“新奥尔良”号（LPD 18）上，在美国海上封锁行动期间监控航运。https://twitter.com/CENTCOM/status/2045548871393194238/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 Reuters : Turkey's long-term contract for importing natural gas from Iran is due to expire in July, with Enerhy Minister Bayraktar reporting that the two countries will potentially hold talks on a possible extension. "According to our forecast, we might need this gas pipeline or the gas flow from Iran for the security of supply of Turkey. There is no negotiation right now ongoing. I think they are busy with so many other things. But we might sit and discuss a potential extension." The agreement provides for the delivery of 9.6 billion cubic metres of gas a year, but actual flows have often fallen short, with Turkey importing 7.6 bcm from Iran last year. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 路透社：土耳其从伊朗进口天然气的长期合同将于7月到期，能源部长拜拉克塔尔表示，两国可能会就可能的延期进行会谈。“根据我们的预测，为了土耳其的供应安全，我们可能需要这条天然气管道或来自伊朗的天然气流。目前还没有正在进行的谈判。我认为他们正忙于许多其他事情。但我们可能会坐下来讨论潜在的延期。”该协议规定每年输送96亿立方米的天然气，但实际流量往往不足，土耳其去年从伊朗进口了76亿立方米。@wfwitness

text: Iran says ships that pay new security and safety fees will be given priority to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, while others may face delays. Source: CNN
text_zh: 伊朗表示，支付新的安保和安全费用的船只将获得优先通过霍尔木兹海峡的权利，而其他船只可能会面临延误。来源：CNN
